behavior_summary: This script implements an area-triggered 'Ancient Ones' encounter/cutscene. When the player (or relevant actor) enters the U8P_ANCTONES::hatch fast-area the script either launches a one-time full encounter/cutscene (music, camera control, temporary visual items, staged barks/dialog lines and animations) or, on repeat activations, spawns a small helper cinematic effect and yields.

U8P_ANCTONES::hatch uses a local-first-activation marker to gate the full sequence so the heavy cutscene only runs once; subsequent activations produce a small repeated effect via engine helper spawns.

U8P_ANCTONES::func0116 is the orchestrator for the full encounter: it checks gating conditions (power/state flags), sets conversation/encounter flags, freezes the avatar, plays music, centers the camera, creates temporary items used as visual anchors, issues a multi-line bark sequence with suspend/timed beats, calls several same-script animation helpers to step item frames, and destroys temporary items when finished.

A family of same-script helpers (U8P_ANCTONES::func130F .. ::func1848) drive timed frame changes and simple state machines on created items by repeatedly calling Item::setFrame, spawning short-lived FREE helper processes (timers), and yielding (suspend) between steps to pace animations.
notable_control_flow: First-entry gating: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch tests a local marker (local0) and only calls U8P_ANCTONES::func0116 to run the full encounter when local0 indicates 'not run yet'; it then sets local0.
On non-first activations U8P_ANCTONES::hatch spawns a small helper process (FREE::func1C19) and suspends rather than replaying the full cutscene.
U8P_ANCTONES::func0116 contains an entry gate (getPowerAO or similar) and uses startedConvo to avoid re-entrancy while the scene runs; it sets ancientOnesMet on first completion.

Timing/animation is implemented cooperatively: helpers call Item::setFrame, spawn FREE::* timing helpers (spawn -> FREE::func1C19 / func1C8B), and issue suspend to yield across ticks and pace visual steps.
Cleanup: temporary visual items are destroyed between barks/steps; U8P_ANCTONES::leaveFastArea calls FREE::resetRef to clear stored references when the actor leaves the trigger region.
open_questions: Exact semantics and parameter meanings for several external calls (precise spawn parameters to FREE::func1C19/func1C8B and their timing behavior).
Precise item types/IDs created by Item::create (only numeric codes observed); exact appearance and choreography are inferred but not fully certain.
Whether any other global game flags beyond startedConvo and ancientOnesMet are read/written by the script (some inferred flags like gotObTip appear but are low-confidence).

main_function.name: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch
main_function.purpose: Area-entry trigger that launches the Ancient Ones encounter/cutscene on first activation and spawns a smaller cinematic helper on subsequent activations.
entry_conditions: Triggered by entering the U8P_ANCTONES::hatch fast-area (process-type 0x0210).
Presence of 'this' trigger object influences initialization of positional references.
local0 == 0 (first-time activation) causes full encounter; otherwise spawn a small helper and suspend.

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch
function_map.role: area-entry trigger / gate for full encounter vs repeated effect

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: leave-area cleanup: call FREE::resetRef to clear stored reference for this trigger

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func0116
function_map.role: orchestrate full Ancient Ones encounter/cutscene (music, camera, freeze, create visuals, barks, call animation helpers, cleanup)

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func130F
function_map.role: item-frame animation utility / small timed frame sequence

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func13CE
function_map.role: item-frame animation utility (multi-step) used by the main sequence

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func150A
function_map.role: short multi-step frame setter for a visual element

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func16A7
function_map.role: frame-loop helper with small conditional/phase counter

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func1732
function_map.role: frame/timer helper that advances frames over multiple ticks

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func17BD
function_map.role: frame/tick helper managing a small frame counter/phase

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::func1848
function_map.role: final-stage frame/phase helper used to conclude animation steps

internal_calls.purpose: Delegate to the full Ancient Ones encounter flow on first activation
Animate/configure one created visual item as part of the cutscene
Animate a created visual item across multiple steps
Drive a reverse step animation on a created item
Short staged frame updates for a visual element at an early beat
Longer multi-step animation for a visual element
Per-frame looping helper to advance animation over ticks
Intermediate animation helper called before a bark
Final animation helper to conclude visuals

external_calls.purpose: Spawn a short-lived helper/cinematic on non-first activations to produce a small repeated effect
Clear stored reference to this trigger when actor leaves the area (cleanup)
Play encounter music at sequence start (example id 0x78 observed)
Freeze the avatar at the start of the cutscene and later restore control (avoid player input during cinematic)
Center/move the camera to focus on encounter coordinates
Create temporary visual items, position them near reference points, and clean them up after each beat
Read coordinates and directions from reference items to position spawned visual items and orient spawned actors
Apply animation/frame indices to temporary items during staged animation steps
Spawn short-lived timing/helper processes between frame updates to pace animations (spawn + suspend pattern)
Spawn helper actor/process to perform an action (movement/animation) oriented with Item::getDirToItem

reads.name: getPowerAO
reads.likely_effect: Gating condition read at U8P_ANCTONES::func0116 entry to decide whether to run full sequence or alternate path

reads.name: startedConvo
reads.likely_effect: Checked to avoid re-entrancy if a conversation/cutscene is already running

reads.name: ancientOnesMet
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine whether the full encounter already occurred (skip vs run)

writes.name: startedConvo
writes.likely_effect: Set to mark the cutscene as in-progress and prevent re-entrancy while the encounter runs

writes.name: ancientOnesMet
writes.likely_effect: Set on first meeting to record that the Ancient Ones encounter has taken place (prevents replaying full encounter)

writes.name: gotObTip
writes.likely_effect: Inferred small script-level flag set when a particular frame/item condition occurs (low-confidence auxiliary state)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements an area-triggered 'Ancient Ones' encounter/cutscene. When the player (or relevant actor) enters the U8P_ANCTONES::hatch fast-area the script either launches a one-time full encounter/cutscene (music, camera control, temporary visual items, staged barks/dialog lines and animations) or, on repeat activations, spawns a small helper cinematic effect and yields.
